title: CORE charter document header (ADR-105 D5)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter header of a charter document under .specs/. Authored per ADR-105 D5 as the minimum-viable schema for the 'charter' document kind. The charter is the constitutional founding document of the CORE project; there is typically one charter file (CORE-CHARTER.md). The prose body is unconstrained; this schema governs only the structured header block.

superseded_by.description: Id of the document that supersedes this charter.
